name: delete_drive_file
description: Permanently delete a file from the operator's Google Drive by its id. This skips the trash and cannot be undone, so confirm the file_id is correct first.

file_id.description: The Drive file id to delete (from search_drive_files).

operator.description: Optional. If omitted, resolves to the BlackBox's current operator (single operator auto-selected; otherwise the system default). Do not hard-code an operator name.

returns: JSON {deleted: true, file_id} on success (or an error string).
notes: Requires Google Workspace connected for the operator. This is a PERMANENT delete (not move-to-trash) and cannot be undone — verify the file_id with get_drive_file / search_drive_files before deleting.
